| Event Type | Source |
|---|---|
| `cluster_created` | `src/db.ts:688` |

| `llm_verifier` | `src/cluster.ts:235` |
| `evidence_revalidation_failed` | `src/clusterEvidenceRevalidation.ts:100` |
